_comment: Historical fixture (unreferenced). Originally reproduced a dead-end FP from the production graph caused by the autoForce commit path: committing auto-forced cascaded dims changed a prior dim's class-wildcard status, so lightKey matched reachSet but commitKey (after autoforce) did not. Picking source=parity would force dist=open and control=open_access, which derives align=failed → reaches 'alien'; the walker's class analysis wildcarded 'source' when dist/control were unset, causing sels with source=lag/far (which cannot reach alien) to share an irrKey with sels that can. This class of FP was eliminated when autoForce was removed from the engine; the light and committed paths now share the same operator. Kept for reference only.
